severities.description: Fine-grained diagnostic detail used for local tracing and deep inspection.
Developer-oriented diagnostic detail that is not normally user-facing.
Informational result or state note that does not require action.
Actionable informational condition that should be visible in summaries.
Non-fatal condition that must remain visible and classified.
Failure condition that blocks the requested operation or proof.
Unrecoverable failure for the current operation or process.
